title: Rendering Pipeline
description: Understand the GPU hardware graphics rendering pipeline: vertex processing, rasterization, and pixel shading.
learningObjectives: Trace geometry through the pipeline stages (Vertex, Rasterizer, Pixel, Output Merger)
Explain projection transformations from World Coordinates to Clip Space
Identify rendering bottlenecks at different pipeline stages

sections.title: Stages of the Graphics Pipeline
sections.content:
The Graphics Pipeline translates 3D coordinate vertices into a 2D grid of pixels on your display monitor:

1. **Input Assembler**: Gathers raw vertex buffers.
2. **Vertex Shader**: Transforms vertex coordinates from local space to clip space. Calculates vertex animations.
3. **Rasterizer**: Converts transformed 3D geometry lines into flat 2D pixel fragments.
4. **Pixel Shader**: Calculates color values for each fragment. Applies textures and lighting calculations.
5. **Output Merger**: Merges pixel depth values to resolve final frame rendering.

sections.title: Clip Space Coordinate Shift
